description.p: stoandl is a Kirigami front-end for the stoandl Pebble companion daemon on Linux. It manages a Pebble smartwatch over Bluetooth: watch faces and apps, host-side extensions, notification forwarding and styling, calendar and health sync, and firmware and language-pack updates.
Convergent by design — the same app runs on the desktop and on Plasma Mobile. It is a thin D-Bus client of the (separately installed) stoandl daemon and does not bundle it.
Initial packaged release with a desktop launcher entry and application icon.
